entities.name: SESAME
entities.description: The target crop (Sesamum indicum L.) used in the pilot-scale genotyping study

entities.name: RAD-SEQ
entities.description: Restriction site-associated DNA sequencing used to reduce genome sequence representation

entities.name: SINGLE-DIGEST RAD-SEQ
entities.description: A RAD-seq protocol using a single restriction enzyme to generate markers

entities.name: DOUBLE-DIGEST RAD-SEQ
entities.description: A RAD-seq protocol using two restriction enzymes to generate markers

entities.name: GBS STRATEGY
entities.description: Genotyping-by-sequencing strategy used to generate RAD markers

entities.name: K-MER COUNT
entities.description: A bioinformatics parameter used to assess performance and identify differences between samples

entities.name: GENE PRESENCE ABSENCE VARIATION
entities.description: A type of genetic variation (PAV) used to analyze differences between sesame samples

entities.name: VARIANT CALLING
entities.description: The process of identifying genetic variants from sequencing datasets

entities.name: SNP COUNT
entities.description: The number of single nucleotide polymorphisms used to identify diverse samples

entities.name: HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: A measure of genetic variation used to identify representative samples in the population

entities.name: NJ
entities.description: Neighbor-Joining analysis used to identify diverse and representative samples

entities.name: PCA
entities.description: Principal Component Analysis used to identify diverse and representative samples

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The genetic variation within the sesame population used to identify representative samples

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within the sesame population

entities.name: CORE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of developing a core collection of representative samples for molecular analysis
